text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Trainer! All right, ready<n>to go
shopping? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know, meeting up before an outing<n>like this...
kinda looks like we're going<n>on a date, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Kidding! Did I getcha? Did I make your<n>heart skip
a beat?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Looks like my ladylike charms are pretty<n>effective
after all. ☆
